# itemFrame(at:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the frame rectangle for the item located at the specified index.

## Declaration

```swift
func itemFrame(at index: Int) -> NSRect
```

## Parameters

- **index**: The index of the item whose frame rectangle you want to obtain.

## Return Value

The frame rectangle of the item.

## Getting Item Information

- **indexOfItem(at:)**: Returns the index of the item at the specified location.
- **visibleItemIndexes()**: Returns the indexes of the view’s currently visible items.
- **cellForItem(at:)**: Returns the browser cell for the item at the specified index.
